sentences.arabic: نَسِيَ حَسَنٌ حَقِيبَتَهُ فِي الْحَافِلَةِ الْمَدْرَسِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Hasan je zaboravio svoju torbu u školskom autobusu.
sentences.translationEn: Hasan forgot his bag on the school bus.

sentences.arabic: بَحَثَ عَنْهَا كَثِيرًا وَلَمْ يَجِدْهَا فِي الْفَصْلِ.
sentences.translation: Dugo je tražio ali je nije pronašao u učionici.
sentences.translationEn: He searched for it a lot and could not find it in the classroom.

sentences.arabic: أَخْبَرَ الْمُعَلِّمَ فَاتَّصَلَ بِالسَّائِقِ عَلَى الْفَوْرِ.
sentences.translation: Obavijestio je nastavnika koji je odmah pozvao vozača.
sentences.translationEn: He told the teacher who called the driver immediately.

sentences.translation: Vozač je pronašao torbu i vratio je Hasanu.
sentences.translationEn: The driver found the bag and returned it to Hasan.
